description: Component: Clicking a grid cell with multiple entries switches the timesheet to list view and does not open the dialog directly.
Component: Clicking an empty grid cell still opens the single-entry creation flow.
Component: Clicking a single-entry grid cell still opens direct single-entry editing.
Component: TimeSheetListView focus filtering renders only the exact matching rows for the clicked work item/date/entry-id set and hides unrelated groups.
Component: Filtered list mode shows a banner describing the focus filter and exposes Clear filter and Back to grid actions.
Interaction: Clear filter removes the focus filter while keeping the user in list view, and Back to grid clears the filter while restoring grid view.
Interaction: Clicking a row from filtered list mode opens the single-entry time-entry dialog for that row.
Component: TimeEntryDialog renders only one entry editor, one Save action, and no internal multi-entry list or Add Entry action.
Regression: Existing delete behavior for a single editable entry still works from the simplified single-entry dialog.
Interaction: If the active filtered row set becomes empty after delete/save, the UI clears the filter and lands in a coherent remaining view state.
Manual browser sanity: grid multi-entry cell → filtered list → single-entry dialog navigation works without failed network requests or browser console errors in the happy path.
Regression: Delegated or read-only timesheet rules continue to suppress editing actions correctly across grid, filtered list, and single-entry dialog flows.
